description: Replace static UI with 21st.dev and ReactBits components to reduce custom code and add polish

userStories.title: Initialize shadcn/ui foundation for 21st.dev components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need shadcn/ui set up so 21st.dev components can be installed via the shadcn CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Run npx shadcn@latest init in frontend/ with New York style and slate base color
components.json exists and points to src/components/ui/
lib/utils.ts exists with cn() helper
Existing Tailwind theme (abyss, deep, card, cyan, warn, etc.) is preserved in globals.css
Existing components still render correctly (no style breakage)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Must preserve custom CSS variables (--abyss, --deep, --card, --cyan, --warn, --border, etc.) and custom animations (sonar, terminalSlideIn, blink, completionFlash, gradientShift, shimmer). shadcn init may overwrite globals.css — merge carefully.

userStories.title: Replace StatusPill with shadcn Badge
userStories.description: As a user, I want consistent status indicators using shadcn Badge instead of the custom StatusPill component.
acceptanceCriteria: Install shadcn Badge component via npx shadcn@latest add badge
Create a MegalodonBadge wrapper in src/components/ui/ that maps existing status types (best, critical, monitor, active, searching, error, out-of-stock) to Badge variants with matching colors
Replace all StatusPill imports with MegalodonBadge across the codebase
StatusPill.tsx is deleted
Badge colors match original: best=emerald, critical=red, monitor=amber, active=cyan, searching=blue, error=red, out-of-stock=gray
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: StatusPill is used in PharmacyCards.tsx and PriceGrid.tsx. Check all import references.

userStories.title: Replace SponsorBadge and ReferencePriceBadge with shadcn Badge variants
userStories.description: As a user, I want sponsor and reference price badges to use the same Badge system for visual consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: SponsorBadge.tsx refactored to use shadcn Badge with outline variant and custom sponsor colors
ReferencePriceBadge.tsx refactored to use shadcn Badge for the WHO price display
All 8 sponsor color mappings preserved (TinyFish=cyan, BrightData=orange, Qwen=purple, OpenRouter=blue, Exa=emerald, ElevenLabs=pink, OpenAI=green, Supermemory=violet)
USD→VND conversion logic preserved in ReferencePriceBadge
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: These are small components (35 and 38 lines). Refactor in-place rather than delete — just swap the rendering to use Badge.

userStories.title: Replace MegalodonAlert with shadcn Alert
userStories.description: As a user, I want alerts to use a standard Alert component instead of the custom implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Install shadcn Alert component via npx shadcn@latest add alert
MegalodonAlert.tsx refactored to use shadcn Alert with destructive variant
Warning icon (AlertTriangle from lucide-react) preserved
Drug name displayed as AlertTitle, message as AlertDescription
Optional Intercept button preserved inside the alert
Left border accent color preserved via className override
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: MegalodonAlert is only 33 lines. Simple swap.

userStories.title: Replace collapsible panels with shadcn Collapsible
userStories.description: As a user, I want ModelRouterPanel and LiveBrowserPreview to use shadcn Collapsible for consistent expand/collapse behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Install shadcn Collapsible via npx shadcn@latest add collapsible
ModelRouterPanel.tsx refactored: header uses CollapsibleTrigger, content uses CollapsibleContent
LiveBrowserPreview.tsx refactored: header uses CollapsibleTrigger, iframe grid uses CollapsibleContent
Expand/collapse animation is smooth (shadcn default transition)
All existing content (pipeline steps, latency bars, sponsor badges, iframes) preserved
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: ModelRouterPanel is 205 lines with custom animations — preserve completionFlash and gradientShift animations. Only replace the expand/collapse mechanism.

userStories.title: Install ReactBits and add Counter animations to LiveMetricsBar
userStories.description: As a user, I want the metrics bar numbers to animate up when they change, creating a polished counting effect.
acceptanceCriteria: Install ReactBits Counter component: npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/Counter-TS-TW
LiveMetricsBar.tsx refactored: each metric value (Agents Deployed, Pharmacies Scanned, Products Found, Savings Detected) uses ReactBits Counter
Counter animates from 0 to current value on mount and animates between value changes
tabular-nums font variant preserved for alignment
Status-based coloring (success, warn) preserved
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: LiveMetricsBar is 97 lines. Counter replaces static number display with animated counting.

userStories.title: Add Counter animations to landing page stats section
userStories.description: As a user, I want the landing page statistics to count up when scrolled into view.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page stats section (4 columns: pharmacies, products, savings %, response time) uses ReactBits Counter
Counters trigger on scroll into view (intersection observer or ScrollFloat wrapper)
Numbers format correctly (e.g., 500+ pharmacies, 10,000+ products)
Existing stat labels and layout preserved
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Stats section is in /frontend/src/app/page.tsx around lines 150-180.

userStories.title: Replace AgentActivityFeed terminal list with ReactBits AnimatedList
userStories.description: As a user, I want the agent event feed to use AnimatedList for smoother entry animations instead of custom CSS keyframes.
acceptanceCriteria: Install ReactBits AnimatedList: npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/AnimatedList-TS-TW
AgentActivityFeed.tsx refactored: event items render via AnimatedList with slide-in animation
Mac window dots header preserved
Event type colors preserved (spawn=cyan, searching=blue, success=green, error=red, variant=purple)
Sonar dot indicators preserved
Blinking cursor when active preserved
Last 50 events limit preserved
Custom terminalSlideIn keyframe can be removed if AnimatedList handles entry animation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: AgentActivityFeed is 157 lines. Only replace the list animation mechanism — keep the terminal styling and event rendering.

userStories.title: Add ReactBits background animation to landing page hero
userStories.description: As a user, I want the landing page hero to have an animated background instead of a static video, creating a more distinctive first impression.
acceptanceCriteria: Install ReactBits Aurora or Hyperspeed background: npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/Aurora-TS-TW
Landing page hero section uses Aurora (or similar deep-sea themed background) behind the hero text
Background uses dark blue/cyan/teal colors matching the abyss theme
Hero text and CTA buttons remain readable over the background
Background has reduced opacity or blur to not distract from content
Existing video element removed or replaced
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Choose a background that fits the deep-sea/abyss theme. Aurora with cyan/teal tones or Particles with bioluminescent colors would work well. Hyperspeed might be too aggressive.

userStories.title: Add ReactBits GlareHover effect to PharmacyCards
userStories.description: As a user, I want pharmacy cards to have a subtle hover glow effect using ReactBits instead of the custom CSS glow animation.
acceptanceCriteria: Install ReactBits GlareHover: npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/GlareHover-TS-TW
PharmacyCards.tsx wraps each card in GlareHover for a glare-on-hover effect
Existing glow animation on result arrival can be kept or replaced with GlareHover trigger
Card content (status pill, result count, lowest price, latency, sparkline) unchanged
Responsive grid layout (2-5 columns) preserved
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: PharmacyCards is 127 lines. GlareHover adds polish without changing functionality.

userStories.title: Replace NavBar with ReactBits Dock or PillNav
userStories.description: As a user, I want the navigation to use a polished animated navigation component instead of the basic custom navbar.
acceptanceCriteria: Install ReactBits Dock: npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/Dock-TS-TW
NavBar.tsx refactored to use Dock (macOS-style) or PillNav component
All 5 navigation links preserved: Dashboard, Trends, Alerts, Optimize, How It Works
Logo (cyan M box) preserved at the start
Language toggle (VN/EN) preserved
Active link highlighting works with Next.js usePathname()
Sticky positioning preserved
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: NavBar is 76 lines. Dock gives a macOS-style magnification effect on hover. PillNav is a more subtle animated pill indicator. Choose whichever fits the dark abyss theme better.

userStories.title: Add ReactBits ScrollReveal to landing page sections
userStories.description: As a user, I want landing page sections to animate in on scroll for a polished experience.
acceptanceCriteria: Install ReactBits ScrollReveal: npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/ScrollReveal-TS-TW
Landing page features grid (3 items) wraps each feature in ScrollReveal
Landing page stats section wraps in ScrollReveal
Landing page CTA section wraps in ScrollReveal
Animations are subtle (fade + slight upward slide)
No layout shift caused by animation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: page.tsx is 230 lines. Wrap major sections — don't animate every element individually.

userStories.title: Replace custom ActionLabel expandable with shadcn Accordion
userStories.description: As a user, I want the analyst verdict details to expand smoothly using shadcn Accordion instead of custom toggle logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Install shadcn Accordion via npx shadcn@latest add accordion
ActionLabel.tsx refactored: expandable reasoning section uses AccordionItem with AccordionTrigger and AccordionContent
Risk level colors (safe=green, caution=yellow, warning=orange, danger=red) preserved via left border
Confidence score badge preserved
Status metadata (RISK, CONFIDENCE, BUY Y/N) preserved
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: ActionLabel is 98 lines. Only the expand/collapse for reasoning details needs to change.

userStories.title: Clean up unused custom CSS animations replaced by library components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove custom CSS keyframes and classes that are no longer used after library adoption.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit globals.css for custom animations no longer referenced: terminalSlideIn (if replaced by AnimatedList), custom glow (if replaced by GlareHover)
Remove only animations confirmed unused via grep across all component files
Keep animations still in use: sonar, blink, completionFlash, gradientShift, shimmer
No visual regressions in any component
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: This is a cleanup story — run after all other stories. Grep for each animation name before removing.
